aboutSection.title: Backend developer with an AI edge
introColumns: I'm Jean de Dieu, a backend developer based in Lomé, Togo. I specialize in building APIs and intelligent systems — from secure authentication to AI-powered matching engines. I'm also the co-founder of Kizo, an event platform I built from the ground up.

Currently pursuing a Master's in AI & Big Data, I bridge solid backend engineering with machine learning capabilities. My background in Mechanical Engineering gives me a problem-solving mindset that I apply to every system I build.

career.description: Building and maintaining RESTful APIs with Python and FastAPI. Implementing authentication systems, payment integrations (Stripe, Paystack, Semoa), AI-powered matching with embeddings and vector databases, and notification systems with Novu.
Contributed to API development, database design, and security implementation. Participated in code reviews and improved development processes.
Built a stock management web app for a client using React.js. Developed interfaces for inventory tracking, order automation, and real-time reports.
Co-founded and built Kizo, an event discovery platform. Designed and developed the full product using Next.js, Supabase, and MongoDB.

education.description: Focused on machine learning, deep learning, NLP, and big data systems.
Built a strong analytical and problem-solving foundation applied to software engineering.
Intensive training in full-stack web development with MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js.

contactSection.intro: Available for freelance projects and collaborations. I typically respond within 24 hours.
